_comment: spec-v7 Step 123 — mutation testing. Scoped first to the highest-value pure extractors (dates, amounts); a separate, slow, on-demand/scheduled job, never the per-push gate. Expand the mutate set as the score is established.
_thresholds_comment: Regression-only (spec-v7 Step 124): break a couple points under the measured baseline (51.26% on dates+amounts, 2026-06-05); never an aspiration. Runs only in the scheduled/on-demand mutation workflow, not the per-push gate. Ratchet up as survivors are killed.
